segments.text: In that day there will be a fountain opened to David’s house and to the inhabitants of Jerusalem, for sin and for uncleanness.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: It will come to pass in that day, says Yahweh of Armies, that I will cut off the names of the idols out of the land, and they will be remembered no more. I will also cause the prophets and the spirit of impurity to pass out of the land.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: It will happen that when anyone still prophesies, then his father and his mother who bore him will tell him, ‘You must die, because you speak lies in Yahweh’s name;’ and his father and his mother who bore him will stab him when he prophesies.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: It will happen in that day that the prophets will each be ashamed of his vision when he prophesies; they won’t wear a hairy mantle to deceive,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: but he will say, ‘I am no prophet, I am a tiller of the ground; for I have been made a bondservant from my youth.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: One will say to him, ‘What are these wounds between your arms?’ Then he will answer, ‘Those with which I was wounded in the house of my friends.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: “Awake, sword, against my shepherd, and against the man who is close to me,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered; and I will turn my hand against the little ones.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: It shall happen that in all the land,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
two parts in it will be cut off and die; 
but the third will be left in it.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
I will bring the third part into the fire, and will refine them as silver is refined, 
and will test them like gold is tested. They will call on my name, and I will hear them. I will say, ‘It is my people;’
and they will say, ‘Yahweh is my God.’
segments.speaker: Yahweh
